zh.lifeSummary: 當James Conyers Lawson於1575年7月出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey48歲，母親Frances Conyers31歲。他於1593年1月8日與Jane Conyers在英國英格蘭達勒姆索可本結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1631年10月20日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Conyers Lawson于1575年7月出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey48岁，母亲Frances Conyers31岁。他于1593年1月8日与Jane Conyers在英国英格兰達勒姆索可本结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1631年10月20日在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic ‘son of Lawrence’; see   Law   1. It is also found in Ireland since the 17th century.
Americanized form of Swedish   Larsson   and Danish, Norwegian or North German   Larsen  .

variants.name: Law
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from a Middle English personal name Law(e), a short form of Lawrence .

Scottish and northern English: topographic name for someone who lived near a hill, northern Middle English law (from Old English hlāw, which generally became low in the south and law in the north). Compare Lowe and Lew .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 羅, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Luo   1.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

en.lifeSummary: When James Conyers Lawson was born in July 1575, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey, was 48 and his mother, Frances Conyers, was 31. He married Jane Conyers on 8 January 1593, in Sockburn, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 20 October 1631, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Conyers Lawson est né en juillet 1575, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Frances Conyers, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Jane Conyers le 8 janvier 1593, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1631, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Conyers Lawson im Juli 1575 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey 48 und seine Mutter Frances Conyers 31. Er hat am 8. Januar 1593 in Sockburn, Durham, England, United Kingdom Jane Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1631 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Conyers Lawson è nato il nel luglio 1575 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Frances Conyers, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Jane Conyers il 8 gennaio 1593, nel Sockburn, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 20 ottobre 1631, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: James Conyers Lawson(이)가 1575년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Conyers(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1593년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 속번에서 Jane Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1631년 10월 20일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Conyers Lawson nasceu em julho de 1575, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Frances Conyers, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Conyers em 8 de janeiro de 1593, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1631, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Conyers Lawson родился июль 1575 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Conyers, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Conyers 8 января 1593 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 20 октября 1631 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Conyers Lawson nació en julio de 1575, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Lawson of Nesham Abbey, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Frances Conyers, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Jane Conyers el 8 de enero de 1593, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1631, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
